# MarketraAI

> MarketraAI is an AI-powered marketing brand for startups and local businesses.

MarketraAI helps businesses grow using AI-driven marketing, automation, content creation, paid ads, SEO, analytics, website solutions, and chatbot integration.

## Website
- Home: https://marketraai.com/
- About: https://marketraai.com/about.html
- Services: https://marketraai.com/services.html
- Blogs: https://marketraai.com/blogs.html
- Contact: https://marketraai.com/contact.html

## Services
- AI + Marketing
- Meta Ads + AI
- Social Media Post Design with AI
- AI Chatbot Integration on Website
- WordPress Website + AI
- SEO + AI
- Google Ads + AI
- Analytics with AI

## Founder
MarketraAI was founded by Himanshu Vishwakarma.
